source: Kale VP et al. 2022 Toxicologic Pathology; Cusi K et al. 2010 NEJM; Nesto RW et al. 2003 Circulation; Edvardsson U et al. 1999 J Lipid Res; Faiola B et al. 2008 Toxicol Pathol
description: Expected findings for PPAR-gamma agonists (rosiglitazone, pioglitazone, troglitazone). Class effects driven by transcriptional activation of PPAR-gamma in adipocytes, hepatocytes, and macrophages: adipogenesis, fluid retention, hemodilution, hepatocellular hypertrophy. BW-up at high dose is regulatorily adverse despite opposing the canonical BW-down adversity direction (cross-references compound-class-flags.json:ppar_gamma_agonist).

expected_findings.description: Body-weight gain via fluid retention + adipogenesis
expected_findings.rationale: PPAR-gamma activation in adipocytes drives adipogenesis; activation in renal collecting duct epithelial cells (ENaC) drives fluid retention. Both mechanisms increase body mass independently. Documented in Kale 2022 Toxicologic Pathology body-weight section.
Improved insulin sensitivity is the intended pharmacological effect; glucose reduction is on-target.

expected_findings.description: Dilutional anemia from plasma volume expansion
expected_findings.severity_threshold: HGB drop >15% with concurrent edema = secondary-pharmacology adverse
expected_findings.rationale: Plasma volume expansion (fluid retention) dilutes RBC mass without true erythroid suppression. Distinguishable from primary anemia by reticulocyte count (preserved or increased).

expected_findings.description: Hepatomegaly from hepatocellular hypertrophy + peroxisome proliferation (rodent-specific)
expected_findings.rationale: Rodent peroxisome proliferation is a class effect of PPAR-alpha and partial PPAR-gamma agonists. NOT human-relevant per IARC peroxisome-proliferator MOA framework — reference KG fact NOAEL-FACT-018 (not-relevant-rodent-peroxisome). Non-rodent species do not show this finding.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Grade 2+ with concurrent ALT/AST elevation = potentially adverse
expected_findings.rationale: Histopathologic correlate of OM_liver_up. Rodent-specific; reference KG fact NOAEL-FACT-018.

expected_findings.description: Peripheral edema from PPAR-gamma-mediated fluid retention
expected_findings.rationale: Documented class effect (Nesto 2003 Circulation). Cross-references C7 corroboration trigger CL_fluid_retention_same_dose_sex in endpoint-adverse-direction.json:BW.

expected_findings.description: Cardiac enlargement secondary to volume overload
expected_findings.rationale: Volume overload from fluid retention drives cardiac remodeling. Documented in Nesto 2003 (CHF risk) and rosiglitazone label warnings.
